---
title: "Editing A Legal Hold Case"
---

---
title: "Editing a Legal Hold Case"
source: "https://support.hyland.com/r/Current/Hyland-Governance/gra1758699116358"
section: "Hyland Governance"
---

You can edit the name, reason, and description of a legal hold case.

To edit a legal hold case:

1.  Access the Legal Hold Management section in Workspace. For more information, see Accessing Legal Hold Management.
2.  Select the legal hold case you want to edit.
3.  Click the Edit Legal Hold Case button next to the Create Legal Hold Case button.  ![The Edit Legal Hold Case button displayed next to the Create Legal Hold Case button](data:image/png;base64,)
4.  Enter a unique name for the legal hold case in the Name field.
5.  Enter the reason this legal hold case is required in the Reason field.
6.  Optional: Add a description for the legal hold case in the Description field.
7.  Update the name, reason, or description field.
8.  Click the Edit Legal Hold Case button. A message confirming update of the legal hold case is displayed.
